---
title: "glm_script_cups_preference"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(Matrix)
library(pbkrtest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(patchwork)
emm_options(lmerTest.limit = 10000)
emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 10000)
```

```{r functions}

# ── TOP-LEVEL HELPERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Run KR anova; fall back to Satterthwaite if negative variance warnings fire.
# pbkrtest emits "Negative variance estimate obtained!" when the model's
# variance-covariance matrix has near-zero/negative eigenvalues — KR ddf are
# untrustworthy in that case, so Satterthwaite is the safer option.
safe_kr_anova <- function(model, verbose = TRUE) {
  neg_var_hit <- FALSE
  result <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      anova(model, ddf = "Kenward-Roger"),
      error = function(e) {
        if (verbose) cat("KR failed, falling back to Satterthwaite:", e$message, "\n")
        NULL
      }
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      if (grepl("Negative variance estimate", conditionMessage(w))) {
        neg_var_hit <<- TRUE
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    }
  )
  if (is.null(result) || neg_var_hit) {
    if (verbose) cat("KR negative variance detected — falling back to Satterthwaite\n")
    result <- anova(model, ddf = "Satterthwaite")
  }
  result
}

# Find interaction term in anova table regardless of variable ordering
find_interaction_term <- function(vars, anova_rownames) {
  candidates <- anova_rownames
  for (v in vars) {
    candidates <- candidates[grepl(paste0("(^|:)", v, "($|:)"), candidates)]
  }
  candidates <- candidates[lengths(strsplit(candidates, ":")) == length(vars)]
  if (length(candidates) == 1) candidates else NA_character_
}

# ── SELECT BEST LMER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
select_best_lmer <- function(data,
                             fixed_effects,
                             conserved_random_effects = NULL,
                             test_random_effects = NULL,
                             criterion = "AIC",
                             REML = FALSE,
                             verbose = TRUE) {

  if (!is.null(conserved_random_effects) && length(conserved_random_effects) > 0) {
    conserved_re_str <- paste0("(1|", conserved_random_effects, ")", collapse = " + ")
    base_formula <- paste(fixed_effects, "+", conserved_re_str)
  } else {
    base_formula <- fixed_effects
    conserved_re_str <- ""
  }

  ctrl <- lmerControl(autoscale = TRUE)

  if (is.null(test_random_effects) || length(test_random_effects) == 0) {

    if (verbose) {
      cat("No test random effects provided — fitting base formula only\n")
      cat("Base formula:", base_formula, "\n\n")
    }

    model_formula <- as.formula(base_formula)

    model_fit <- tryCatch({
      lmer(model_formula, data = data, REML = FALSE, control = ctrl)
    }, error = function(e) {
      if (verbose) cat("Model failed:", e$message, "\n")
      return(NULL)
    }, warning = function(w) {
      if (verbose) cat("Model warning:", w$message, "\n")
      lmer(model_formula, data = data, REML = FALSE, control = ctrl)
    })

    if (is.null(model_fit)) stop("Base model failed to converge!")

    conv_check <- if (is.null(model_fit@optinfo$conv$lme4$messages)) {
      TRUE
    } else {
      !any(grepl("failed to converge", model_fit@optinfo$conv$lme4$messages))
    }

    best_model_info <- tibble(
      model_num      = 1L,
      random_effects = "",
      n_random       = 0L,
      AIC            = AIC(model_fit),
      BIC            = BIC(model_fit),
      logLik         = as.numeric(logLik(model_fit)),
      converged      = conv_check,
      formula        = base_formula
    )

    if (verbose) {
      cat("Model fitting complete!\n\nBest model by", criterion, ":\n")
      print(best_model_info)
      cat("\n")
    }

    best_model_ml <- lmer(model_formula, data = data, REML = FALSE, control = ctrl)
    best_model    <- lmer(model_formula, data = data, REML = TRUE, control = ctrl)

    if (verbose) {
      cat("Best model formula:\n")
      print(formula(best_model))
      cat("\nComputing KR F-tests...\n")
    }

    interaction_test <- safe_kr_anova(best_model, verbose = verbose)

    if (verbose) {
      cat("Omnibus F-tests:\n")
      print(interaction_test)
      cat("\n")
    }

    return(list(
      best_model       = best_model,
      best_model_ml    = best_model_ml,
      interaction_test = interaction_test,
      model_results    = best_model_info,
      best_model_info  = best_model_info,
      all_results      = best_model_info
    ))
  }

  all_combinations <- lapply(0:length(test_random_effects), function(n) {
    if (n == 0) list(character(0))
    else combn(test_random_effects, n, simplify = FALSE)
  }) %>% unlist(recursive = FALSE)

  if (verbose) {
    cat("Testing", length(all_combinations), "random effects combinations\n")
    cat("Base formula:", base_formula, "\n\n")
  }

  model_results <- tibble(
    model_num      = integer(),
    random_effects = character(),
    n_random       = integer(),
    AIC            = numeric(),
    BIC            = numeric(),
    logLik         = numeric(),
    converged      = logical(),
    formula        = character()
  )

  for (i in seq_along(all_combinations)) {

    test_re_terms <- if (length(all_combinations[[i]]) == 0) {
      ""
    } else {
      paste0("(1|", all_combinations[[i]], ")", collapse = " + ")
    }

    formula_str <- if (test_re_terms == "") {
      base_formula
    } else {
      paste(base_formula, "+", test_re_terms)
    }

    model_formula <- as.formula(formula_str)

    model_fit <- tryCatch({
      lmer(model_formula, data = data, REML = REML, control = ctrl)
    }, error = function(e) {
      if (verbose) cat("Model", i, "failed:", e$message, "\n")
      return(NULL)
    }, warning = function(w) {
      if (verbose) cat("Model", i, "warning:", w$message, "\n")
      lmer(model_formula, data = data, REML = REML, control = ctrl)
    })

    if (!is.null(model_fit)) {
      conv_check <- if (is.null(model_fit@optinfo$conv$lme4$messages)) {
        TRUE
      } else {
        !any(grepl("failed to converge", model_fit@optinfo$conv$lme4$messages))
      }

      model_results <- model_results %>%
        add_row(
          model_num      = i,
          random_effects = paste(all_combinations[[i]], collapse = " + "),
          n_random       = length(all_combinations[[i]]),
          AIC            = AIC(model_fit),
          BIC            = BIC(model_fit),
          logLik         = as.numeric(logLik(model_fit)),
          converged      = conv_check,
          formula        = formula_str
        )
    }

    if (verbose && i %% 50 == 0) {
      cat("Fitted", i, "of", length(all_combinations), "models\n")
    }
  }

  if (verbose) cat("\nModel fitting complete!\n\n")

  model_results_filtered <- model_results %>%
    filter(converged) %>%
    arrange(!!sym(criterion))

  best_model_info <- model_results_filtered %>% slice(1)

  if (nrow(best_model_info) == 0) stop("No models converged successfully!")

  if (verbose) {
    cat("Best model by", criterion, ":\n")
    print(best_model_info)
    cat("\n")
  }

  best_formula   <- as.formula(best_model_info$formula)
  best_model_ml  <- lmer(best_formula, data = data, REML = FALSE, control = ctrl)
  best_model     <- lmer(best_formula, data = data, REML = TRUE, control = ctrl)

  if (verbose) {
    cat("Best model formula:\n")
    print(formula(best_model))
    cat("\nComputing KR F-tests...\n")
  }

  interaction_test <- safe_kr_anova(best_model, verbose = verbose)

  if (verbose) {
    cat("Omnibus F-tests:\n")
    print(interaction_test)
    cat("\n")
  }

  return(list(
    best_model       = best_model,
    best_model_ml    = best_model_ml,
    interaction_test = interaction_test,
    model_results    = model_results_filtered,
    best_model_info  = best_model_info,
    all_results      = model_results
  ))
}

# ── ANALYZE AND PLOT CONTRASTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────
analyze_and_plot_contrasts <- function(model,
                                       interaction_test,
                                       plot_title,
                                       agent_colors,
                                       y_label = "Fitted Values",
                                       x_var = "agent",
                                       x_var2 = NULL,
                                       band_var = "band",
                                       alpha = 0.05) {
  #' Analyze contrasts and create plots based on interaction significance.
  #' x_var2 can be a factor or a continuous variable (e.g., Preference).
  #' When x_var2 is continuous, contrasts are run on x_var at the mean of x_var2.

  model_formula_str <- paste(deparse(formula(model)), collapse = " ")
  model_formula_str <- gsub("\\s+", " ", model_formula_str)

  add_sig_stars <- function(df) {
    df$p.value.adjusted <- p.adjust(df$p.value, method = "BH")
    df %>% mutate(sig = case_when(
      p.value.adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value.adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value.adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
      p.value.adjusted < 0.1   ~ ".",
      TRUE                     ~ ""
    ))
  }

  model_data <- augment(model)

  # Handle numeric x_var (coerce to factor for plotting, store levels for at=)
  x_var_at <- NULL
  if (is.numeric(model_data[[x_var]])) {
    x_var_at        <- list(sort(unique(model_data[[x_var]])))
    names(x_var_at) <- x_var
    model_data      <- model_data %>% mutate(!!sym(x_var) := factor(!!sym(x_var)))
  }

  # Detect continuous x_var2 and build at= entry for its mean
  x_var2_is_numeric <- !is.null(x_var2) && is.numeric(model_data[[x_var2]])
  x_var2_at <- NULL
  if (x_var2_is_numeric) {
    x_var2_at        <- list(mean(model_data[[x_var2]], na.rm = TRUE))
    names(x_var2_at) <- x_var2
  }
  emm_at <- c(x_var_at, x_var2_at)

  # ── CASE: x_var2 provided — screen for two-way and three-way interactions ────
  if (!is.null(x_var2)) {

    three_way_term <- find_interaction_term(c(band_var, x_var, x_var2), rownames(interaction_test))
    two_way_term   <- find_interaction_term(c(x_var, x_var2),           rownames(interaction_test))

    three_way_sig <- !is.na(three_way_term) && interaction_test[three_way_term, "Pr(>F)"] < alpha
    two_way_sig   <- !is.na(two_way_term)   && interaction_test[two_way_term,   "Pr(>F)"] < alpha

    if (three_way_sig) {

      cat("Three-way", paste0(band_var, ":", x_var, ":", x_var2), "interaction is significant\n")

      # For continuous x_var2: contrast x_var per band at mean(x_var2)
      # For factor x_var2: contrast both x_var and x_var2 per band
      emm_formula <- as.formula(paste0("~ ", x_var, " * ", band_var))
      contrasts_emm <- emmeans(model, emm_formula, at = emm_at)

      if (x_var2_is_numeric) {
        raw_contrasts  <- contrast(contrasts_emm, simple = x_var,
                                   method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")
        contrast_tests <- summary(raw_contrasts) %>%
          as_tibble() %>%
          add_sig_stars()
      } else {
        full_emm_formula <- as.formula(paste0("~ ", x_var, " * ", x_var2, " * ", band_var))
        contrasts_emm    <- emmeans(model, full_emm_formula, at = emm_at)
        raw_contrasts    <- contrast(contrasts_emm,
                                     simple = list(x_var, x_var2),
                                     method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")
        contrast_tests   <- do.call(rbind, summary(raw_contrasts)) %>%
          as_tibble() %>%
          add_sig_stars()
      }

      print(contrast_tests)
      contrasts_sig <- contrast_tests %>% filter(sig != "")

      if (nrow(contrasts_sig) > 0) {
        sig_bands <- unique(contrasts_sig[[band_var]])
        plot_data <- model_data %>% filter(!!sym(band_var) %in% sig_bands)

        p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = !!sym(band_var), y = .fitted, fill = !!sym(x_var))) +
          geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), alpha = 0.7) +
          stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3,
                       position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                       shape = 95, show.legend = FALSE) +
          stat_summary(fun.data = function(x) {
            data.frame(ymin = quantile(x, 0.25), ymax = quantile(x, 0.75))
          }, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2,
          position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), show.legend = FALSE) +
          geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.9),
                     alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
          {if (!x_var2_is_numeric) facet_wrap(as.formula(paste0("~ ", x_var2)))} +
          scale_fill_manual(values = agent_colors) +
          theme_minimal() +
          labs(x = "Frequency Band", y = y_label,
               fill = stringr::str_to_title(x_var),
               title = paste0(plot_title, " (Significant Bands)"),
               subtitle = model_formula_str) +
          theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
                plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, face = "italic"))

        return(list(plot = p, contrasts = contrast_tests, plot_type = "three_way_interaction"))

      } else {
        cat("No significant contrasts found after correction\n")
        return(list(plot = NULL, contrasts = contrast_tests, plot_type = "no_significant_contrasts"))
      }

    } else if (two_way_sig) {

      cat("Two-way", paste0(x_var, ":", x_var2),
          "interaction is significant (averaged across", band_var, ")\n")

      emm_formula   <- as.formula(paste0("~ ", x_var))
      contrasts_emm <- emmeans(model, emm_formula, at = emm_at)
      raw_contrasts <- contrast(contrasts_emm, method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")
      contrast_tests <- summary(raw_contrasts) %>%
        as_tibble() %>%
        add_sig_stars()

      print(contrast_tests)
      contrasts_sig <- contrast_tests %>% filter(sig != "")

      if (nrow(contrasts_sig) > 0) {
        p <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = !!sym(x_var), y = .fitted, fill = !!sym(x_var))) +
          geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), alpha = 0.7) +
          stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3,
                       position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                       shape = 95, show.legend = FALSE) +
          stat_summary(fun.data = function(x) {
            data.frame(ymin = quantile(x, 0.25), ymax = quantile(x, 0.75))
          }, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2,
          position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), show.legend = FALSE) +
          geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.9),
                     alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
          scale_fill_manual(values = agent_colors) +
          theme_minimal() +
          labs(x = stringr::str_to_title(x_var), y = y_label,
               fill = stringr::str_to_title(x_var),
               title = paste0(plot_title, " (Averaged Across ", stringr::str_to_title(band_var), ")"),
               subtitle = model_formula_str) +
          theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
                plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, face = "italic"))

        return(list(plot = p, contrasts = contrast_tests, plot_type = "two_way_interaction"))

      } else {
        cat("No significant contrasts found after correction\n")
        return(list(plot = NULL, contrasts = contrast_tests, plot_type = "no_significant_contrasts"))
      }

    } else {
      cat("Neither three-way nor", paste0(x_var, ":", x_var2),
          "two-way interaction is significant — falling back to single-predictor screening on", x_var, "\n")
      x_var2 <- NULL
    }
  }

  # ── CASE: single x_var ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  interaction_term <- find_interaction_term(c(band_var, x_var), rownames(interaction_test))
  if (is.na(interaction_term)) interaction_term <- paste0(band_var, ":", x_var)

  interaction_sig <- !is.na(interaction_term) &&
                     interaction_test[interaction_term, "Pr(>F)"] < alpha
  agent_sig       <- interaction_test[x_var, "Pr(>F)"] < alpha

  if (interaction_sig) {

    cat("Band:agent interaction is significant - running contrasts by band\n")

    emm_formula   <- as.formula(paste0("~ ", x_var, " * ", band_var))
    contrasts_emm <- emmeans(model, emm_formula, at = x_var_at)
    all_contrasts <- contrast(contrasts_emm, simple = x_var,
                              method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")
    contrast_tests <- summary(all_contrasts) %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      mutate(p.value.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
             sig = case_when(
               p.value.adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
               p.value.adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
               p.value.adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
               p.value.adjusted < 0.1   ~ ".",
               TRUE                     ~ ""
             ))

    print(contrast_tests)
    contrasts_sig <- contrast_tests %>% filter(sig != "")

    if (nrow(contrasts_sig) > 0) {
      sig_bands <- unique(contrasts_sig[[band_var]])
      plot_data <- model_data %>% filter(!!sym(band_var) %in% sig_bands)

      p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = !!sym(band_var), y = .fitted, fill = !!sym(x_var))) +
        geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), alpha = 0.7) +
        stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3,
                     position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
                     shape = 95, show.legend = FALSE) +
        stat_summary(fun.data = function(x) {
          data.frame(ymin = quantile(x, 0.25), ymax = quantile(x, 0.75))
        }, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2,
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), show.legend = FALSE) +
        geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.9),
                   alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = agent_colors) +
        theme_minimal() +
        labs(x = "Frequency Band", y = y_label,
             fill = stringr::str_to_title(x_var),
             title = paste0(plot_title, " (Significant Bands)"),
             subtitle = model_formula_str) +
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
              plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, face = "italic"))

      return(list(plot = p, contrasts = contrast_tests, plot_type = "interaction"))

    } else {
      cat("No significant contrasts found after correction\n")
      return(list(plot = NULL, contrasts = contrast_tests, plot_type = "no_significant_contrasts"))
    }

  } else if (agent_sig) {

    cat("Only main effect of agent is significant - running contrasts averaged across bands\n")

    emm_formula    <- as.formula(paste0("~ ", x_var))
    agent_contrasts <- emmeans(model, emm_formula)
    agent_pairwise  <- contrast(agent_contrasts, method = "pairwise", adjust = "none")
    contrast_tests  <- summary(agent_pairwise) %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      mutate(p.value.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
             sig = case_when(
               p.value.adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
               p.value.adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
               p.value.adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
               p.value.adjusted < 0.1   ~ ".",
               TRUE                     ~ ""
             ))

    print(contrast_tests)

    p <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = !!sym(x_var), y = .fitted, fill = !!sym(x_var))) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, width = 0.6) +
      geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.2), alpha = 0.3, size = 1.5) +
      stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 4, shape = 95) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = agent_colors) +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(x = stringr::str_to_title(x_var), y = y_label,
           fill = stringr::str_to_title(x_var),
           title = paste0(plot_title, " (Averaged Across Bands)"),
           subtitle = model_formula_str) +
      theme(legend.position = "none",
            plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 8, face = "italic"))

    return(list(plot = p, contrasts = contrast_tests, plot_type = "main_effect"))

  } else {
    cat("Neither band:agent interaction nor agent main effect is significant\n")
    return(list(plot = NULL, contrasts = NULL, plot_type = "no_significant_effects"))
  }
}

# ── ANALYZE MULTIPLE REGIONS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
analyze_multiple_regions <- function(data_list,
                                     region_names,
                                     fixed_effects,
                                     conserved_random_effects,
                                     test_random_effects,
                                     title = NULL,
                                     agent_colors,
                                     y_label = "Fitted Values",
                                     x_var = "agent",
                                     x_var2 = NULL,
                                     band_var = "band",
                                     criterion = "AIC",
                                     REML = FALSE,
                                     alpha = 0.05,
                                     verbose = TRUE) {

  if (length(data_list) != length(region_names)) {
    stop("data_list and region_names must be the same length")
  }

  plot_titles <- paste(region_names, title)

  all_plots             <- list()
  all_contrasts         <- list()
  all_models            <- list()
  all_model_comparisons <- list()
  all_interaction_tests <- list()

  max_n <- max(sapply(data_list, nrow))
  limit <- ceiling(max_n * 2)
  emm_options(lmerTest.limit = limit, pbkrtest.limit = limit)
  if (verbose) cat("Set emmeans limits to", limit, "\n\n")

  for (i in seq_along(data_list)) {

    region <- region_names[i]
    data   <- data_list[[i]]

    if (verbose) {
      cat("==================================================\n")
      cat("Processing:", region, "\n")
      cat("==================================================\n")
    }

    if (verbose) cat("\n--- Running model selection ---\n")

    model_selection <- tryCatch({
      select_best_lmer(
        data                     = data,
        fixed_effects            = fixed_effects,
        conserved_random_effects = conserved_random_effects,
        test_random_effects      = test_random_effects,
        criterion                = criterion,
        REML                     = REML,
        verbose                  = verbose
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR in model selection for", region, ":", e$message, "\n")
      return(NULL)
    })

    if (is.null(model_selection)) {
      cat("Skipping", region, "due to model selection error\n\n")
      next
    }

    best_model <- model_selection$best_model
    all_models[[region]]            <- best_model
    all_model_comparisons[[region]] <- model_selection$model_results
    all_interaction_tests[[region]] <- model_selection$interaction_test

    if (verbose) cat("\n--- Running contrast analysis ---\n")

    contrast_results <- tryCatch({
      analyze_and_plot_contrasts(
        model            = best_model,
        interaction_test = model_selection$interaction_test,
        plot_title       = plot_titles[i],
        agent_colors     = agent_colors,
        y_label          = y_label,
        x_var            = x_var,
        x_var2           = x_var2,
        band_var         = band_var,
        alpha            = alpha
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("ERROR in contrast analysis for", region, ":", e$message, "\n")
      return(NULL)
    })

    if (is.null(contrast_results)) {
      cat("Skipping", region, "due to contrast analysis error\n\n")
      next
    }

    all_plots[[region]] <- contrast_results$plot

    if (!is.null(contrast_results$contrasts)) {
      all_contrasts[[region]] <- contrast_results$contrasts %>%
        mutate(
          region        = region,
          model_formula = paste(deparse(formula(best_model)), collapse = " "),
          plot_type     = contrast_results$plot_type,
          .before       = 1
        )
    }

    if (verbose) cat("\n")
  }

  combined_contrasts <- bind_rows(all_contrasts)

  if (verbose) {
    cat("\n==================================================\n")
    cat("SUMMARY\n")
    cat("==================================================\n")
    cat("Regions analyzed:", length(all_models), "/", length(region_names), "\n")
    cat("Plots created:", sum(!sapply(all_plots, is.null)), "\n")
    cat("Total contrasts:", nrow(combined_contrasts), "\n")
    cat("Significant contrasts:", sum(combined_contrasts$sig != "", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  }

  return(list(
    plots             = all_plots,
    contrasts         = combined_contrasts,
    interaction_tests = all_interaction_tests,
    models            = all_models,
    model_comparisons = all_model_comparisons
  ))
}
```

```{r load_data}
neural_df    <- read.csv("C:/Users/megha/Documents/GitHub/diff_fam_social_memory_ephys/pilot2/cups_phase4/r_stuff/ultra_long_neural_data_cups.csv")
behavior_df  <- read.csv("C:/Users/megha/Documents/GitHub/diff_fam_social_memory_ephys/pilot2/cups_phase4/r_stuff/behavior_dataframe.csv")
arena_info_df <- read.csv("C:/Users/megha/Documents/GitHub/diff_fam_social_memory_ephys/pilot2/cups_phase4/r_stuff/cups_dataframe.csv")

behavior_df <- behavior_df |>
  rename(X = level_0,
         empty.preference = empty.prefernce)

behavior_long_time <- behavior_df |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c('familiar', 'novel', 'cagemate', 'empty'),
               names_to = 'agent', values_to = 'Total Investigation') |>
  select(-c('familiar.preference', 'novel.preference', 'cagemate.preference', 'empty.preference'))

behavior_long_pref <- behavior_df |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c('familiar.preference', 'novel.preference', 'cagemate.preference', 'empty.preference'),
               names_to = 'agent', values_to = 'Preference') |>
  mutate(agent = str_remove(agent, ".preference")) |>
  select(-c('familiar', 'novel', 'cagemate', 'empty'))

behavior_long <- full_join(behavior_long_time, behavior_long_pref, by = c("X", "agent", "total.cup.time"))

arena_info_trimmed_df <- arena_info_df |>
  select(-c("X", "rank", "total_investigation_time", "avg_event_length")) |>
  rename("X" = "subject")

neural_df <- neural_df |>
  select(-"X") |>
  rename("X" = "subject") |>
  rename("agent" = "event")

arena_neural_merge <- full_join(neural_df, arena_info_trimmed_df, by = c("X", "agent"))

more_behavior_data <- read.csv("C:/Users/megha/Documents/GitHub/diff_fam_social_memory_ephys/pilot2/cups_phase4/r_stuff/event_data.csv")
more_behavior_data <- more_behavior_data |>
  rename(X = subject)

all_behavior <- full_join(more_behavior_data, behavior_long_pref, by = c("X", "agent")) |>
  left_join(
    behavior_long_time |> select(X, agent, total_investigation = `Total Investigation`),
    by = c("X", "agent")
  )
all_behavior <- all_behavior |>
  mutate(trial = as_factor(trial))

arena_neural_merge <- arena_neural_merge |>
  mutate(trial = as_factor(trial))

all_df <- full_join(all_behavior, arena_neural_merge, by = c("X", "agent", "trial"))

all_df <- all_df %>%
  mutate(
    event_length_cat = cut(event_length,
                           breaks = c(0, 2500, 5000, 15000, 50000, Inf),
                           labels = c("<2.5s", "<5s", "<15s", "<50s", ">50s"),
                           include.lowest = TRUE),
    preference_cat = cut(Preference,
                         breaks = c(0, .25, .5, .75, Inf),
                         labels = c("strong dislike", "slight dislike",
                                    "slight preference", "strong preference"),
                         include.lowest = TRUE))

all_df <- all_df |>
  mutate(X                = as_factor(X),
         agent            = as_factor(agent),
         location         = as_factor(location),
         color            = as_factor(color),
         hco.rel.rank     = as_factor(hco.rel.rank),
         um.rel.rank      = as_factor(um.rel.rank),
         band             = as_factor(band),
         metric           = as_factor(metric),
         gen_baseline     = as_factor(gen_baseline),
         region_or_pair   = as_factor(region_or_pair))

# Compute rel_log_pref: within-subject centered log(total investigation time).
# Centering is done at the X × agent level (one unique value per cell), not
# at the event level, so the mean is not weighted by event count.
rel_log_pref_lut <- behavior_long_time |>
  rename(total_investigation = `Total Investigation`) |>
  select(X, agent, total_investigation) |>
  group_by(X) |>
  mutate(rel_log_pref = log(total_investigation) - mean(log(total_investigation), na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(X, agent, rel_log_pref) |>
  mutate(X = as_factor(X))

all_df <- left_join(all_df, rel_log_pref_lut, by = c("X", "agent"))

not_gen_baseline <- all_df |>
  filter(gen_baseline == 0) |>
  drop_na() |>
  droplevels()

power_df <- not_gen_baseline |>
  filter(metric == 'power') |>
  filter(agent != 'empty') |>
  drop_na() |>
  droplevels()

coherence_df <- not_gen_baseline |>
  filter(metric == 'coherence') |>
  filter(agent != 'empty') |>
  drop_na() |>
  droplevels()

granger_df <- not_gen_baseline |>
  filter(metric == 'granger') |>
  filter(agent != 'empty') |>
  drop_na() |>
  droplevels()
```

```{r aggregate}
# Collapse to subject × agent × band × region — the level at which rel_log_pref
# actually varies. This removes within-subject event-level pseudoreplication
# for the rel_log_pref predictor and gives honest ddf / CIs.

agg_power_df <- power_df %>%
  group_by(X, agent, band, region_or_pair, rel_log_pref) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(X = as_factor(X), agent = as_factor(agent), band = as_factor(band),
         region_or_pair = as_factor(region_or_pair))

agg_coherence_df <- coherence_df %>%
  group_by(X, agent, band, region_or_pair, rel_log_pref) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(X = as_factor(X), agent = as_factor(agent), band = as_factor(band),
         region_or_pair = as_factor(region_or_pair))

agg_granger_df <- granger_df %>%
  group_by(X, agent, band, region_or_pair, rel_log_pref) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(X = as_factor(X), agent = as_factor(agent), band = as_factor(band),
         region_or_pair = as_factor(region_or_pair))

cat("Aggregated power rows:    ", nrow(agg_power_df),
    " (", n_distinct(agg_power_df$X), "subjects ×",
    n_distinct(agg_power_df$agent), "agents ×",
    n_distinct(agg_power_df$band), "bands ×",
    n_distinct(agg_power_df$region_or_pair), "regions)\n")
cat("Aggregated coherence rows:", nrow(agg_coherence_df), "\n")
cat("Aggregated granger rows:  ", nrow(agg_granger_df), "\n")
```

```{r power_analysis}
data_list <- list(
  agg_power_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC'),
  agg_power_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc'),
  agg_power_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'MD'),
  agg_power_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'BLA'),
  agg_power_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'vHPC')
)
region_names <- c("mPFC", "NAc", "MD", "BLA", "vHPC")

agent_colors <- c("cagemate" = "#792910",
                  "familiar" = "#FFAF00",
                  "novel"    = "#15616F")

results <- analyze_multiple_regions(
  data_list                = data_list,
  region_names             = region_names,
  fixed_effects            = "value ~ band * agent * rel_log_pref",
  conserved_random_effects = "X",
  test_random_effects      = c(),
  agent_colors             = agent_colors,
  y_label                  = "Fitted Power Values",
  x_var                    = "agent",
  x_var2                   = "rel_log_pref",
  criterion                = "AIC",
  REML                     = FALSE,
  verbose                  = TRUE
)

print(results$plots$mPFC)
print(results$plots$NAc)
print(results$plots$MD)
print(results$plots$BLA)
print(results$plots$vHPC)

View(results$contrasts)
```

```{r coherence_analysis}
coherence_region_names <- c("mPFC_NAc", "mPFC_MD", "mPFC_BLA", "mPFC_vHPC",
                             "NAc_MD", "NAc_BLA", "NAc_vHPC",
                             "MD_BLA", "BLA_vHPC", "MD_vHPC")

coherence_data_list <- list(
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_NAc'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_MD'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_BLA'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_vHPC'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc_MD'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc_BLA'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc_vHPC'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'MD_BLA'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'BLA_vHPC'),
  agg_coherence_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'MD_vHPC')
)

coherence_results <- analyze_multiple_regions(
  data_list                = coherence_data_list,
  region_names             = coherence_region_names,
  fixed_effects            = "value ~ band * agent * rel_log_pref",
  title                    = "Coherence",
  conserved_random_effects = "X",
  test_random_effects      = c(),
  agent_colors             = agent_colors,
  y_label                  = "Fitted Coherence Values",
  x_var                    = "agent",
  x_var2                   = "rel_log_pref",
  criterion                = "AIC",
  REML                     = FALSE,
  verbose                  = TRUE
)

for (r in coherence_region_names) print(coherence_results$plots[[r]])

View(coherence_results$contrasts)
```

```{r granger_analysis}
granger_data_list <- list(
  mPFC_to_NAc  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_to_NAc'),
  mPFC_to_MD   = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_to_MD'),
  mPFC_to_BLA  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_to_BLA'),
  mPFC_to_vHPC = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'mPFC_to_vHPC'),
  NAc_to_mPFC  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc_to_mPFC'),
  NAc_to_MD    = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc_to_MD'),
  NAc_to_BLA   = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc_to_BLA'),
  NAc_to_vHPC  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'NAc_to_vHPC'),
  BLA_to_mPFC  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'BLA_to_mPFC'),
  BLA_to_NAc   = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'BLA_to_NAc'),
  BLA_to_MD    = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'BLA_to_MD'),
  BLA_to_vHPC  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'BLA_to_vHPC'),
  MD_to_mPFC   = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'MD_to_mPFC'),
  MD_to_NAc    = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'MD_to_NAc'),
  MD_to_BLA    = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'MD_to_BLA'),
  MD_to_vHPC   = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'MD_to_vHPC'),
  vHPC_to_mPFC = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'vHPC_to_mPFC'),
  vHPC_to_NAc  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'vHPC_to_NAc'),
  vHPC_to_BLA  = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'vHPC_to_BLA'),
  vHPC_to_MD   = agg_granger_df |> filter(region_or_pair == 'vHPC_to_MD')
)

granger_results <- analyze_multiple_regions(
  data_list                = granger_data_list,
  region_names             = names(granger_data_list),
  fixed_effects            = "value ~ band * agent * rel_log_pref",
  title                    = "Granger",
  conserved_random_effects = "X",
  test_random_effects      = c(),
  agent_colors             = agent_colors,
  y_label                  = "Fitted Granger Causality Values",
  x_var                    = "agent",
  x_var2                   = "rel_log_pref",
  criterion                = "AIC",
  REML                     = FALSE,
  verbose                  = TRUE
)

for (r in names(granger_data_list)) print(granger_results$plots[[r]])

View(granger_results$contrasts)
```

```{r global_bh}
apply_global_bh <- function(results) {
  results$contrasts <- results$contrasts %>%
    mutate(
      p.value.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      sig = case_when(
        p.value.adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value.adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p.value.adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
        p.value.adjusted < 0.1   ~ ".",
        TRUE                     ~ ""
      )
    )
  return(results)
}

results          <- apply_global_bh(results)
coherence_results <- apply_global_bh(coherence_results)
granger_results   <- apply_global_bh(granger_results)
```

```{r heatmap_helpers}
# ── GET SLOPES FOR ONE REGION ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Uses emtrends to extract Preference slope per agent per band.
# plot_type: "three_way" | "two_way" | "none"
get_slopes_for_region <- function(model, region, plot_type,
                                  bands = c("Delta", "Theta", "Beta",
                                            "Low gamma", "High gamma")) {
  if (plot_type == "three_way") {
    emtrends(model, specs = ~ agent | band,
             var = "rel_log_pref", lmer.df = "satterthwaite") %>%
      summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      mutate(region   = region,
             band_col = as.character(band))

  } else if (plot_type == "two_way") {
    # Preference:agent sig but no band interaction — collapse across bands
    emtrends(model, specs = ~ agent,
             var = "rel_log_pref", lmer.df = "satterthwaite") %>%
      summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
      as_tibble() %>%
      tidyr::crossing(band_col = bands) %>%
      mutate(region = region)

  } else {
    # No significant Preference interaction — grey placeholder
    tidyr::crossing(agent    = c("cagemate", "familiar", "novel"),
                    band_col = bands) %>%
      mutate(rel_log_pref.trend = NA_real_,
             SE               = NA_real_,
             df               = NA_real_,
             t.ratio          = NA_real_,
             p.value          = NA_real_,
             lower.CL         = NA_real_,
             upper.CL         = NA_real_,
             region           = region)
  }
}

# ── PREFERENCE HEATMAP FUNCTION ───────────────────────────────────────────────
# all_slopes: the full slope_results tibble (used to set shared color limits)
plot_preference_heatmap <- function(slopes_df, all_slopes, agent_color, title,
                                    region_order = NULL, band_order = NULL) {

  global_lim <- max(abs(all_slopes$rel_log_pref.trend), na.rm = TRUE)

  if (!is.null(region_order)) {
    slopes_df <- slopes_df %>%
      mutate(region = factor(region, levels = region_order))
  }

  ggplot(slopes_df,
         aes(x = band_col, y = region, fill = rel_log_pref.trend)) +

    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8,
              aes(alpha = if_else(is.na(rel_log_pref.trend), 0.15, 1.0))) +

    # Grey overlay for NA cells (no significant Preference interaction)
    geom_tile(data = slopes_df %>% filter(is.na(rel_log_pref.trend)),
              fill = "#CCCCCC", color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +

    # Significance stars
    geom_text(aes(label = sig), size = 5, fontface = "bold",
              color = "black", na.rm = TRUE) +

    # Diverging scale: blue = LFP decreases with Preference,
    #                  agent color = LFP increases with Preference
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low      = "#2166AC",
      mid      = "white",
      high     = agent_color,
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-global_lim, global_lim),
      name     = "rel_log_pref\nslope\n(emtrend)",
      na.value = "#CCCCCC"
    ) +

    scale_alpha_identity() +

    scale_x_discrete(limits = if (!is.null(band_order)) band_order
                              else c("Delta", "Theta", "Beta",
                                     "Low gamma", "High gamma")) +

    labs(title = title,
         x     = "Frequency band",
         y     = "Brain region / pair") +

    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title   = element_text(face = "bold", color = agent_color, size = 14),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 9)
    )
}
```

```{r preference_slope_comparison}
# ── PLOT EMMEANS FITTED VALUES ACROSS PREFERENCE FOR ONE REGION + BAND ────────
# Analogous to plot_exposure_slopes_comparison in the habit_dishabit script.
# Shows how LFP tracks the subject's preference score for cagemate vs novel,
# with a CI ribbon — this is the individual coefficient visualized in the heatmap.

plot_preference_slopes_comparison <- function(models,
                                               region,
                                               band_name,
                                               agent_colors = c(cagemate = "#792910",
                                                                novel    = "#15616F"),
                                               metric_label = "LFP Value",
                                               pref_seq = seq(-3, 3, by = 0.25)) {

  model <- models[[region]]
  if (is.null(model)) {
    warning("No model found for region: ", region)
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ── 1. emmeans at each Preference step, holding band fixed ──────────────────
  emm_df <- emmeans(
    model,
    ~ agent | rel_log_pref,
    at      = list(rel_log_pref = pref_seq, band = band_name),
    lmer.df = "satterthwaite"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    filter(agent %in% c("cagemate", "novel"))

  if (nrow(emm_df) == 0) {
    warning("emmeans returned no rows for region = '", region,
            "', band = '", band_name, "'")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # ── 2. emtrends for slope annotation in subtitle ─────────────────────────────
  trends_df <- emtrends(
    model,
    specs   = ~ agent | band,
    var     = "rel_log_pref",
    at      = list(band = band_name),
    lmer.df = "satterthwaite"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    filter(as.character(band) == band_name,
           agent %in% c("cagemate", "novel")) %>%
    mutate(
      sig = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
        p.value < 0.1   ~ ".",
        TRUE            ~ "n.s."
      ),
      label = paste0(agent, ": β = ", round(rel_log_pref.trend, 4), " ", sig)
    )

  subtitle_text <- paste(trends_df$label, collapse = "   |   ")

  # ── 3. Plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  p <- ggplot(emm_df,
              aes(x     = rel_log_pref,
                  y     = emmean,
                  color = agent,
                  fill  = agent,
                  group = agent)) +

    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL),
                alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +

    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +

    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL),
                  width = 0.02, linewidth = 0.5) +

    geom_point(size = 3) +

    scale_color_manual(values = agent_colors) +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = agent_colors) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-3, 3, by = 1),
                       labels = c("-3\n(avoid)", "-2", "-1", "0\n(avg)", "1", "2", "3\n(prefer)")) +

    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.4) +

    labs(
      title    = paste0(region, " — ", band_name),
      subtitle = subtitle_text,
      x        = "Relative log investigation (centered within subject)",
      y        = metric_label,
      color    = "Agent",
      fill     = "Agent"
    ) +

    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40", family = "mono")
    )

  return(p)
}

# ── EXAMPLE USAGE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Change region/band_name/metric_label to inspect any cell in the heatmap
p <- plot_preference_slopes_comparison(
  models       = results$models,
  region       = "mPFC",
  band_name    = "Delta",
  metric_label = "Fitted LFP Power"
)
print(p)
```

```{r power_heatmap}
# ── 1. Determine plot type per region ────────────────────────────────────────
power_interaction_lookup <- imap_dfr(results$interaction_tests, function(it, region) {
  three_way_term <- find_interaction_term(c("band", "agent", "rel_log_pref"), rownames(it))
  two_way_term   <- find_interaction_term(c("agent", "rel_log_pref"),          rownames(it))
  tibble(
    region        = region,
    three_way_sig = !is.na(three_way_term) && it[three_way_term, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05,
    two_way_sig   = !is.na(two_way_term)   && it[two_way_term,   "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05
  )
})
print(power_interaction_lookup)

# ── 2. Extract emtrends per region ───────────────────────────────────────────
power_slope_results <- imap_dfr(results$models, function(model, region) {
  lookup    <- power_interaction_lookup %>% filter(region == !!region)
  plot_type <- case_when(
    lookup$three_way_sig ~ "three_way",
    lookup$two_way_sig   ~ "two_way",
    TRUE                 ~ "none"
  )
  get_slopes_for_region(model, region, plot_type)
})

# ── 3. BH correction ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
power_slope_results <- power_slope_results %>%
  mutate(
    p.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    sig = case_when(
      is.na(p.value)     ~ "",
      p.adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
      p.adjusted < 0.1   ~ ".",
      TRUE               ~ ""
    ),
    band_col = factor(band_col,
                      levels = c("Delta", "Theta", "Beta", "Low gamma", "High gamma")),
    region   = factor(region, levels = c("mPFC", "NAc", "MD", "BLA", "vHPC"))
  )

# ── 4. Separate and plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
slopes_cagemate_power <- power_slope_results %>% filter(agent == "cagemate")
slopes_novel_power    <- power_slope_results %>% filter(agent == "novel")

p_cagemate_power <- plot_preference_heatmap(
  slopes_df   = slopes_cagemate_power,
  all_slopes  = power_slope_results,
  agent_color = "#792910",
  title       = "Cagemate — LFP rel_log_pref slope (Power)",
  region_order = c("mPFC", "NAc", "MD", "BLA", "vHPC")
)

p_novel_power <- plot_preference_heatmap(
  slopes_df   = slopes_novel_power,
  all_slopes  = power_slope_results,
  agent_color = "#15616F",
  title       = "Novel — LFP rel_log_pref slope (Power)",
  region_order = c("mPFC", "NAc", "MD", "BLA", "vHPC")
)

p_cagemate_power + p_novel_power +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "LFP Power vs rel_log_pref: cagemate vs novel",
    subtitle = "Blue = LFP decreases with rel_log_pref | Colored = increases | Grey = no sig rel_log_pref effect",
    theme    = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40")
    )
  )

ggsave("r_stuff/preference_heatmaps_power.png",
       width = 14, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```

```{r coherence_heatmap}
coherence_interaction_lookup <- imap_dfr(coherence_results$interaction_tests, function(it, region) {
  three_way_term <- find_interaction_term(c("band", "agent", "rel_log_pref"), rownames(it))
  two_way_term   <- find_interaction_term(c("agent", "rel_log_pref"),          rownames(it))
  tibble(
    region        = region,
    three_way_sig = !is.na(three_way_term) && it[three_way_term, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05,
    two_way_sig   = !is.na(two_way_term)   && it[two_way_term,   "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05
  )
})
print(coherence_interaction_lookup)

coherence_slope_results <- imap_dfr(coherence_results$models, function(model, region) {
  lookup    <- coherence_interaction_lookup %>% filter(region == !!region)
  plot_type <- case_when(
    lookup$three_way_sig ~ "three_way",
    lookup$two_way_sig   ~ "two_way",
    TRUE                 ~ "none"
  )
  get_slopes_for_region(model, region, plot_type)
})

coherence_slope_results <- coherence_slope_results %>%
  mutate(
    p.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    sig = case_when(
      is.na(p.value)     ~ "",
      p.adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
      p.adjusted < 0.1   ~ ".",
      TRUE               ~ ""
    ),
    band_col = factor(band_col,
                      levels = c("Delta", "Theta", "Beta", "Low gamma", "High gamma")),
    region   = factor(region, levels = coherence_region_names)
  )

# Keep only bands where at least one region × agent has a real slope estimate
sig_coh_bands <- coherence_slope_results %>%
  filter(agent %in% c("cagemate", "novel"), !is.na(rel_log_pref.trend)) %>%
  pull(band_col) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()

# Preserve canonical ordering, just drop all-grey columns
all_bands <- c("Delta", "Theta", "Beta", "Low gamma", "High gamma")
sig_coh_band_order <- all_bands[all_bands %in% sig_coh_bands]

slopes_cagemate_coh <- coherence_slope_results %>%
  filter(agent == "cagemate", band_col %in% sig_coh_bands)
slopes_novel_coh    <- coherence_slope_results %>%
  filter(agent == "novel",    band_col %in% sig_coh_bands)

p_cagemate_coh <- plot_preference_heatmap(
  slopes_df    = slopes_cagemate_coh,
  all_slopes   = coherence_slope_results,
  agent_color  = "#792910",
  title        = "Cagemate — LFP rel_log_pref slope (Coherence)",
  region_order = coherence_region_names,
  band_order   = sig_coh_band_order
)

p_novel_coh <- plot_preference_heatmap(
  slopes_df    = slopes_novel_coh,
  all_slopes   = coherence_slope_results,
  agent_color  = "#15616F",
  title        = "Novel — LFP rel_log_pref slope (Coherence)",
  region_order = coherence_region_names,
  band_order   = sig_coh_band_order
)

p_cagemate_coh + p_novel_coh +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "LFP Coherence vs rel_log_pref: cagemate vs novel",
    subtitle = "Blue = LFP decreases with rel_log_pref | Colored = increases | Grey = no sig rel_log_pref effect",
    theme    = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40")
    )
  )

ggsave("r_stuff/preference_heatmaps_coherence.png",
       width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```

```{r granger_heatmap}
granger_region_names <- names(granger_data_list)

granger_interaction_lookup <- imap_dfr(granger_results$interaction_tests, function(it, region) {
  three_way_term <- find_interaction_term(c("band", "agent", "rel_log_pref"), rownames(it))
  two_way_term   <- find_interaction_term(c("agent", "rel_log_pref"),          rownames(it))
  tibble(
    region        = region,
    three_way_sig = !is.na(three_way_term) && it[three_way_term, "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05,
    two_way_sig   = !is.na(two_way_term)   && it[two_way_term,   "Pr(>F)"] < 0.05
  )
})
print(granger_interaction_lookup)

granger_slope_results <- imap_dfr(granger_results$models, function(model, region) {
  lookup    <- granger_interaction_lookup %>% filter(region == !!region)
  plot_type <- case_when(
    lookup$three_way_sig ~ "three_way",
    lookup$two_way_sig   ~ "two_way",
    TRUE                 ~ "none"
  )
  get_slopes_for_region(model, region, plot_type)
})

granger_slope_results <- granger_slope_results %>%
  mutate(
    p.adjusted = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    sig = case_when(
      is.na(p.value)     ~ "",
      p.adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
      p.adjusted < 0.1   ~ ".",
      TRUE               ~ ""
    ),
    band_col = factor(band_col,
                      levels = c("Delta", "Theta", "Beta", "Low gamma", "High gamma")),
    region   = factor(region, levels = granger_region_names)
  )

# Keep only directional pairs where at least one agent has a real slope estimate
sig_gran_regions <- granger_slope_results %>%
  filter(agent %in% c("cagemate", "novel"), !is.na(rel_log_pref.trend)) %>%
  pull(region) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()

# Preserve original ordering, just drop all-grey rows
sig_gran_order <- granger_region_names[granger_region_names %in% sig_gran_regions]

slopes_cagemate_gran <- granger_slope_results %>%
  filter(agent == "cagemate", region %in% sig_gran_regions)
slopes_novel_gran    <- granger_slope_results %>%
  filter(agent == "novel",    region %in% sig_gran_regions)

p_cagemate_gran <- plot_preference_heatmap(
  slopes_df    = slopes_cagemate_gran,
  all_slopes   = granger_slope_results,
  agent_color  = "#792910",
  title        = "Cagemate — LFP rel_log_pref slope (Granger)",
  region_order = sig_gran_order
)

p_novel_gran <- plot_preference_heatmap(
  slopes_df    = slopes_novel_gran,
  all_slopes   = granger_slope_results,
  agent_color  = "#15616F",
  title        = "Novel — LFP rel_log_pref slope (Granger)",
  region_order = sig_gran_order
)

p_cagemate_gran + p_novel_gran +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "LFP Granger Causality vs rel_log_pref: cagemate vs novel",
    subtitle = "Blue = LFP decreases with rel_log_pref | Colored = increases | Grey = no sig rel_log_pref effect",
    theme    = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40")
    )
  )

ggsave("r_stuff/preference_heatmaps_granger.png",
       width = 14, height = max(3, length(sig_gran_order) * 0.5 + 2),
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
